summary: Municipal energy and water consumption and cost data for Berkeley facilities by site, showing annual electricity, natural gas, and water usage.
Berkeley Energy Savings Ordinance (BESO) building assessment data with APN, assessment type, status, and associated energy score.
PG&E metered energy data for Berkeley showing total electricity and natural gas consumption in MMBtu by sector and year.
Berkeley Municipal Code 17.08 creek centerlines with creek names, certainty levels, and presumptive creek designations.
City park locations in Berkeley with names, addresses, types, and hyperlinks to park pages.
Berkeley Municipal Code 17.08 creek catchment areas by name.
Open creek setback zones under Berkeley BMC 17.08 with creek name, buffer distance, and certainty level.
Culverted creek setback zones under Berkeley BMC 17.08 with creek name, buffer distance, and certainty level.
ZIP code area boundaries and populations for Berkeley from 2010 Census with population and square miles.
Berkeley City Council district boundaries with ACS demographic and citizen voting age population data.
